name: part_002
file: tmp_【 3DLIVE 】#アキロゼ生誕祭2026 ーLife is GAMEー【ホロライブ⧸アキ・ローゼンタール】 [_tBlI-l8WLk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_002.webm

scenes.description: Aki Rosenthal performs the song 'Deal with the devil'.
MC section: Aki catches her breath, greets the viewers, and shares the hashtag.
Logo transition animation with the #アキロゼ生誕祭2026 hashtag.
Aki wakes up in a casino-themed room and discovers a roulette wheel.

subtitles.original: ...見せてあげる
subtitles.english: ...I'll show you.

subtitles.original: 秘密って甘い毒
subtitles.english: Secrets are a sweet poison.

subtitles.original: 仕掛けて 罠にハメるわ
subtitles.english: Setting them up, I'll trap them in my snare.

subtitles.original: 指先 誘ううなじよ
subtitles.english: My fingertips, your inviting nape.

subtitles.original: 心は求めてる じれったい
subtitles.english: My heart is yearning, it's so frustrating.

subtitles.original: 何も知らないような顔で
subtitles.english: With a face that looks like it knows nothing,

subtitles.original: 踊るわ あなたを
subtitles.english: I'll dance you around.

subtitles.original: かすり傷に 油断見せ 読み切ったレシオだ
subtitles.english:
Showing my guard is down for a scratch,
I've read the ratio.

subtitles.original: 目移りだって 変に逃さないわ
subtitles.english:
Even as your eyes wander,
I won't let a strange one slip away.

subtitles.original: どんな小さなズレだってお見通しの目は ごまかされないわ
subtitles.english:
Even the smallest deviation, my seeing eyes
won't be fooled.

subtitles.original: I'm the gambler 愛だとかレース ギャンブル相手はごめんだわ
subtitles.english:
I'm the gambler, love or races,
I don't want a gambling partner.

subtitles.original: 失格してあげる
subtitles.english: I'll disqualify you.

subtitles.original: 狙った獲物は逃さない
subtitles.english: I won't let my targeted prey escape.

subtitles.original: 唇 濡らして 頂くわ もう一度
subtitles.english: Wetting my lips, I'll have you once more.

subtitles.original: ダイヤのジャックで 手が揃うわ
subtitles.english: With a Jack of Diamonds, my hand is complete.

subtitles.original: 笑みは殺し待つだけ
subtitles.english: I'll just kill my smile and wait.

subtitles.original: 私のポーカーフェイスはパーフェクト
subtitles.english: My poker face is perfect.

subtitles.original: 一部の隙も見せたりしないわ
subtitles.english: I won't show even the slightest opening.

subtitles.original: Don't think about what comes after one game.
subtitles.english: Don't think about what comes after one game.

subtitles.original: Don't think about what comes after one game.
subtitles.english: Don't think about what comes after one game.

subtitles.original: Don't think about what comes after one game.
subtitles.english: Don't think about what comes after one game.

subtitles.original: Don't think about what comes after one game.
subtitles.english: Don't think about what comes after one game.

subtitles.original: 視線感じて上から
subtitles.english: I feel your gaze from above.

subtitles.original: お熱いのは 最後まで
subtitles.english: Stay hot until the very end.

subtitles.original: 見てばかりいないで アタシが 欲しいなら
subtitles.english: Don't just watch, if you want me.

subtitles.original: 負けるのは怖い? 合図して 読み切ったレシオだ
subtitles.english: Scared to lose? Give the signal, I've read the ratio.

subtitles.original: 目移りだって変にかわして アタシのものにする あなたの髪の一本まで全部
subtitles.english:
Dodge those wandering eyes and make you mine,
every last strand of your hair.

subtitles.original: I'm the gambler 愛だとかレース 震えているのよ 坊や どこまで行くの?
subtitles.english:
I'm the gambler, love or races,
you're trembling, boy, how far will you go?

subtitles.original: 目移りだって 手を貸すわ 躊躇い忘れ 誰にも触らせない このままで
subtitles.english:
Even for wandering eyes, I'll lend a hand,
forget hesitation, I won't let anyone touch you,
just like this.

subtitles.original: I'm the gambler 愛だとかレース さぁ覚悟決めて 灰になるまで打って
subtitles.english:
I'm the gambler, love or races,
now prepare yourself, keep playing until you turn to ash.

subtitles.original: 欲しがる気持ちはまだ ベビー
subtitles.english: Your greedy feelings are still baby-like.

subtitles.original: 誰にも負けない感じさせて ダーリン
subtitles.english: Make me feel like I won't lose to anyone, Darling.

subtitles.original: あれ? 椅子なくなっちゃった...
subtitles.english: Wait? The chairs are gone...

subtitles.original: あぁ...もうちょっと座らせて欲しかった...
subtitles.english: Ahh... I wanted to sit for a bit longer...

subtitles.original: はい! みんな見えてる? 聞こえてる?
subtitles.english: Alright! Can everyone see me? Can you hear me?

subtitles.original: ホロライブ所属の癒し系ハーフエルフ、アキロゼことアキ・ローゼンタールです!
subtitles.english:
I'm the healing-type half-elf from Hololive,
Aki Rosenthal, also known as AkiRose!

subtitles.original: ハロハロハロ! アローナ!
subtitles.english: Halo-halo-halo! Aloha!

subtitles.original: はぁ...えー、今回のアキロゼ生誕祭2026へ、ようこそ!
subtitles.english: Whew... Uh, welcome to AkiRose Birthday 2026!

subtitles.original: 早速ね、なんか色々行われていたんですが、
subtitles.english: Right away, there's been various things going on, but...

subtitles.original: 一体今回のライブはどうなっちゃうのか、是非最後まで一瞬、
subtitles.english:
just what will happen in this live? Please,
for every single moment until the end,

subtitles.original: お見逃しなくお願いします!
subtitles.english: don't miss a thing!

subtitles.original: 今回のライブのハッシュタグは、「#アキロゼ生誕祭2026」。
subtitles.english: The hashtag for this live is "#アキロゼ生誕祭2026".

subtitles.original: こちらをつけて、Xにたくさんポストしてね!
subtitles.english: Add this and post lots on X!

subtitles.original: もちろん、可愛いスクショ...フゥー!
subtitles.english: Of course, cute screenshots... whew!

subtitles.original: 良いのたくさん撮って、合わせてポストしてください。
subtitles.english: Take lots of good ones and post them together.

subtitles.original: ライブが終わった後、アキロゼ見に行きます! 見てね!
subtitles.english: After the live, I'll go check them out! Watch till the end!

subtitles.original: あ、チャンネル登録もよろしくね! オッケー?
subtitles.english: Oh, and please subscribe to the channel! Okay?

subtitles.original: ポチッとな。はい、ありがとう!
subtitles.english: Click. Yes, thank you!

subtitles.original: うーん...っていうか、ここどこなんだろう? うーん...
subtitles.english: Hmm... I mean, where am I exactly? Hmm...

subtitles.original: おっ? おおー! あんな所にルーレットがある!
subtitles.english: Oh? Whoa! There's a roulette wheel over there!

subtitles.original: え、回るのかな?
subtitles.english: Huh, I wonder if it spins?

subtitles.original: おっ、回ったー! え、すごーい!
subtitles.english: Oh, it's spinning! Whoa, amazing!

subtitles.original: おー、回った! 何が出るかな?
subtitles.english: Oh, it spun! I wonder what'll come up?
